nodes.label: Dungeon Call
nodes.description: The project has officially started and begun development. All changes will be listed on this page as well as all progress.

nodes.label: Veilmar
nodes.description: Veilmar is the main city of Dungeon Call where the adventurers of the world reside. This is in development!

nodes.label: Combat
nodes.description: Combat mechanics not started but intend to begin with magic.

nodes.label: Inventory System & Stat System
nodes.description: This system will be where you manage your items but on the opposite side there will also be your player information such as stats.

nodes.label: Magic Combat
nodes.description: The magic system is going to the starting point for the combat system. Magic will have a huge variety but will start simple.

nodes.label: Mana Control
nodes.description: This is going to the basics of magic before you move onto actual magic variety and specialty. You will manipulate mana in its raw form and this is where every mage will begin.

nodes.label: Mana Specialisations
nodes.description: Stemming from this node is where all of the magic specialisations will be categorised as a teaser for you all to see and how they progress.
